problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
hypothesis: Constructed wetland for water filtration may resolve What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
